test.name: Proceed to payment without filling shipping form shows error

kw.name: Create Dictionary
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.name: Set To Dictionary
kw.doc: Adds the given ``key_value_pairs`` and/or ``items`` to the ``dictionary``.

kw.name: Open Application
kw.doc: Opens a new application to given Appium server. Capabilities of appium server, Android and iOS, Please check https://appium.io/docs/en/2.1/cli/args/ | *Option* | *Man.* | *Description* | | remote_url | Yes | Appium server url | | alias | no | alias | | strict_ssl | No | allows you to send commands to an invalid certificate host like a self-signed one. |

kw.name: Capture Page Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into the log.

kw.msg: Keyword 'Capture Page Screenshot' could not be run on failure: No application is open

WebDriverException: Message: An unknown server-side error occurred while processing the command. Original error: Cannot start the 'com.saucelabs.mydemoapp.android' application. Consider checking the driver's troubleshooting documentation. Original error: Error executing adbExec. Original error: 'Command '/Users/hendysatriawan/Library/Android/sdk/platform-tools/adb -P 5037 -s emulator-5554 shell am start -W -n com.saucelabs.mydemoapp.android/com.saucelabs.mydemoapp.android.view.activities.SplashActivity -S -a android.intent.action.MAIN -c android.intent.category.LAUNCHER -f 0x10200000' timed out after 20000ms'. Try to increase the 20000ms adb execution timeout represented by 'adbExecTimeout' capability Stacktrace: UnknownError: An unknown server-side error occurred while processing the command. Original error: Cannot start the 'com.saucelabs.mydemoapp.android' application. Consider checking the driver's troubleshooting documentation. Original error: Error executing adbExec. Original error: 'Command '/Users/hendysatriawan/Library/Android/sdk/platform-tools/adb -P 5037 -s emulator-5554 shell am start -W -n com.saucelabs.mydemoapp.android/com.saucelabs.mydemoapp.android.view.activities.SplashActivity -S -a android.intent.action.MAIN -c android.intent.category.LAUNCHER -f 0x10200000' timed out after 20000ms'. Try to increase the 20000ms adb execution timeout represented by 'adbExecTimeout' capability at getResponseForW3CError (/usr/local/lib/node_modules/appium/node_modules/@appium/base-driver/lib/protocol/errors.js:1143:9) at asyncHandler (/usr/local/lib/node_modules/appium/node_modules/@appium/base-driver/lib/protocol/protocol.js:487:57)

kw.name: Test Finished
Run Keyword If Test Failed
kw.doc: Runs the given keyword with the given arguments, if the test failed.

kw.name: Capture Page Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into the log.

kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into the log.

kw.msg: Keyword 'Capture Page Screenshot' could not be run on failure: No application is open

kw.name: Close Application
kw.doc: Closes the current application and also close webdriver session.

kw.name: Capture Page Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into the log.

kw.msg: Keyword 'Capture Page Screenshot' could not be run on failure: No application is open

kw.status:
Several failures occurred:
1) No application is open
2) No application is open

test.doc: Test case untuk memverifikasi bahwa pengguna tidak dapat melanjutkan ke pembayaran tanpa mengisi formulir alamat pengiriman dan menampilkan pesan error.
test.status:
Setup failed: WebDriverException: Message: An unknown server-side error occurred while processing the command. Original error: Cannot start the 'com.saucelabs.mydemoapp.android' application. Consider checking the driver's troubleshooting documentation. Original error: Error executing adbExec. Original error: 'Command '/Users/hendysatriawan/Library/Android/sdk/platform-tools/adb -P 5037 -s emulator-5554 shell am start -W -n com.saucelabs.mydemoapp.android/com.saucelabs.mydemoapp.android.view.activities.SplashActivity -S -a android.intent.action.MAIN -c android.intent.category.LAUNCHER -f 0x10200000' timed out after 20000ms'. Try to increase the 20000ms adb execution timeout represented by 'adbExecTimeout' capability Stacktrace: UnknownError: An unknown server-side error occurred while processing the command. Original error: Cannot start the 'com.saucelabs.mydemoapp.android' application. Consider checking the driver's troubleshooting documentation. Original error: Error executing adbExec. Original error: 'Command '/Users/hendysatriawan/Library/Android/sdk/platform-tools/adb -P 5037 -s emulator-5554 shell am start -W -n com.saucelabs.mydemoapp.android/com.saucelabs.mydemoapp.android.view.activities.SplashActivity -S -a android.intent.action.MAIN -c android.intent.category.LAUNCHER -f 0x10200000' timed out after 20000ms'. Try to increase the 20000ms adb execution timeout represented by 'adbExecTimeout' capability at getResponseForW3CError (/usr/local/lib/node_modules/appium/node_modules/@appium/base-driver/lib/protocol/errors.js:1143:9) at asyncHandler (/usr/local/lib/node_modules/appium/node_modules/@appium/base-driver/lib/protocol/protocol.js:487:57)
Also teardown failed: Several failures occurred:
1) No application is open
2) No application is open

test.name: Proceed payment without filling payment form shows error

kw.name: Create Dictionary
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.name: Set To Dictionary
kw.doc: Adds the given ``key_value_pairs`` and/or ``items`` to the ``dictionary``.

kw.name: Open Application
kw.doc: Opens a new application to given Appium server. Capabilities of appium server, Android and iOS, Please check https://appium.io/docs/en/2.1/cli/args/ | *Option* | *Man.* | *Description* | | remote_url | Yes | Appium server url | | alias | no | alias | | strict_ssl | No | allows you to send commands to an invalid certificate host like a self-signed one. |

kw.name: Wait Until Keyword Succeeds
kw.doc: Runs the specified keyword and retries if it fails.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until element specified with `locator` is visible.

kw.name: Evaluate
kw.doc: Evaluates the given expression in Python and returns the result.

kw.name: Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Random Int
kw.doc: Generate a random integer between two integers ``min`` and ``max`` inclusive while observing the provided ``step`` value.

kw.name: Random Int
kw.doc: Generate a random integer between two integers ``min`` and ``max`` inclusive while observing the provided ``step`` value.

kw.name: Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Catenate
kw.doc: Catenates the given items together and returns the resulted string.

kw.name: Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Set Test Variable
kw.doc: Makes a variable available everywhere within the scope of the current test.

kw.name: Set Test Variable
kw.doc: Makes a variable available everywhere within the scope of the current test.

kw.name: Run Keyword And Return Status
kw.doc: Runs the given keyword with given arguments and returns the status as a Boolean value.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until element specified with `locator` is visible.

kw.arg: Item dengan index ${random_index} tidak ditemukan pada katalog

kw.doc: Catenates the given items together and returns the resulted string.

kw.msg: StaleElementReferenceException: Message: Cached elements 'By.id: com.saucelabs.mydemoapp.android:id/menuIV' do not exist in DOM anymore; For documentation on this error, please visit: https://www.selenium.dev/documentation/webdriver/troubleshooting/errors#stale-element-reference-exception Stacktrace: io.appium.uiautomator2.common.exceptions.StaleElementReferenceException: Cached elements 'By.id: com.saucelabs.mydemoapp.android:id/menuIV' do not exist in DOM anymore at io.appium.uiautomator2.model.ElementsCache.restore(ElementsCache.java:78) at io.appium.uiautomator2.model.ElementsCache.get(ElementsCache.java:153) at io.appium.uiautomator2.handler.GetElementAttribute.safeHandle(GetElementAttribute.java:23) at io.appium.uiautomator2.server.AppiumServlet.handleHttpRequest(AppiumServlet.java:271) at io.appium.uiautomator2.http.ServerHandler.channelRead(ServerHandler.java:77) at io.netty.channel.AbstractChannelHandlerContext.invokeChannelRead(AbstractChannelHandlerContext.java:366) at io.netty.channel.AbstractChannelHandlerContext.invokeChannelRead(AbstractChannelHandlerContext.java:352) at io.netty.channel.AbstractChannelHandlerContext.fireChannelRead(AbstractChannelHandlerContext.java:345) at io.netty.handler.codec.MessageToMessageDecoder.channelRead(MessageToMessageDecoder.java:102) at io.netty.channel.AbstractChannelHandlerContext.invokeChannelRead(AbstractChannelHandlerContext.java:366) at io.netty.channel.AbstractChannelHandlerContext.invokeChannelRead(AbstractChannelHandlerContext.java:352) at io.netty.channel.AbstractChannelHandlerContext.fireChannelRead(AbstractChannelHandlerContext.java:345) at io.netty.channel.CombinedChannelDuplexHandler$DelegatingChannelHandlerContext.fireChannelRead(CombinedChannelDuplexHandler.java:435) at io.netty.handler.codec.ByteToMessageDecoder.fireChannelRead(ByteToMessageDecoder.java:293) at io.netty.handler.codec.ByteToMessageDecoder.channelRead(ByteToMessageDecoder.java:267) at io.netty.channel.CombinedChannelDuplexHandler.channelRead(CombinedChannelDuplexHandler.java:250) at io.netty.channel.AbstractChannelHandlerContext.invokeChannelRead(AbstractChannelHandlerContext.java:366) at io.netty.channel.AbstractChannelHandlerContext.invokeChannelRead(AbstractChannelHandlerContext.java:352) at io.netty.channel.AbstractChannelHandlerContext.fireChannelRead(AbstractChannelHandlerContext.java:345) at io.netty.handler.timeout.IdleStateHandler.channelRead(IdleStateHandler.java:266) at io.netty.channel.AbstractChannelHandlerContext.invokeChannelRead(AbstractChannelHandlerContext.java:366) at io.netty.channel.nio.AbstractNioByteChannel$NioByteUnsafe.read(AbstractNioByteChannel.java:131) at io.netty.channel.nio.NioEventLoop.processSelectedKey(NioEventLoop.java:611) at io.netty.channel.nio.NioEventLoop.processSelectedKeysOptimized(NioEventLoop.java:552) at io.netty.channel.nio.NioEventLoop.processSelectedKeys(NioEventLoop.java:466) at io.netty.channel.nio.NioEventLoop.run(NioEventLoop.java:438) at io.netty.util.concurrent.SingleThreadEventExecutor$2.run(SingleThreadEventExecutor.java:140) at kw.doc: Makes a variable available globally in all tests and suites.

kw.name: Set Global Variable
kw.doc: Makes a variable available globally in all tests and suites.

kw.name: Country
kw.doc: :sample:

kw.name: Set Global Variable
kw.doc: Makes a variable available globally in all tests and suites.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until element specified with `locator` is visible.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given `text` into text field identified by `locator`.

kw.name: Then Error on payment form should be displayed
verify fullname payment is required error message displayed
Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until element specified with `locator` is visible.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until element specified with `locator` is visible.

kw.name: Element Text Should Be
kw.doc: Verifies element identified by ``locator`` exactly contains text ``expected``.
kw.msg: Verifying element 'id=com.saucelabs.mydemoapp.android:id/nameErrorTV' contains exactly text 'Value looks invalid.'.

kw.name: Run Keyword If Test Failed
kw.doc: Runs the given keyword with the given arguments, if the test failed.

kw.name: Close Application
kw.doc: Closes the current application and also close webdriver session.

test.doc: Test case untuk memverifikasi bahwa pengguna tidak dapat menyelasaikan pembayaran tanpa mengisi formulir pembayaran dan menampilkan pesan error.

test.name: Login fails when password is empty and error is shown

kw.name: Create Dictionary
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.name: Set To Dictionary
kw.doc: Adds the given ``key_value_pairs`` and/or ``items`` to the ``dictionary``.

kw.name: Open Application
kw.doc: Opens a new application to given Appium server. Capabilities of appium server, Android and iOS, Please check https://appium.io/docs/en/2.1/cli/args/ | *Option* | *Man.* | *Description* | | remote_url | Yes | Appium server url | | alias | no | alias | | strict_ssl | No | allows you to send commands to an invalid certificate host like a self-signed one. |

kw.name: Wait Until Keyword Succeeds
kw.doc: Runs the specified keyword and retries if it fails.

kw.name: Open Application
kw.doc: Opens a new application to given Appium server. Capabilities of appium server, Android and iOS, Please check https://appium.io/docs/en/2.1/cli/args/ | *Option* | *Man.* | *Description* | | remote_url | Yes | Appium server url | | alias | no | alias | | strict_ssl | No | allows you to send commands to an invalid certificate host like a self-signed one. |

errors.msg: Keyword 'Capture Page Screenshot' could not be run on failure: No application is open
